label.name: The hub can be mounted in any orientation that is parallel to the axis of the aircraft. Select what orientation the box is mounted in.
Once the orientation is set, level the main axis of the aircraft then select Calibrate to set the final alignment.

label.Name: If the aircraft has a different attitude when taxiing then return the aircraft to that position and select Set Offset to set that angle.

label.name: This table is a VE enhancement. For a 10% extra fuel entry enter 110 which will calculate VE * 1.10
